title: German Basics
description: A2 Grammar structures using simple A1 vocabulary

challenges.original: I have eaten a green apple
challenges.translation: Ich habe einen grünen Apfel gegessen

challenges.original: He wants to drink a cold water
challenges.translation: Er will ein kaltes Wasser trinken

challenges.original: We are going to the small supermarket
challenges.translation: Wir gehen in den kleinen Supermarkt

challenges.original: She has called her mother
The man is buying a cheap bread
challenges.translation: Der Mann kauft ein billiges Brot

challenges.original: I can see the tall tree
challenges.translation: Ich kann den hohen Baum sehen

challenges.original: They have found the keys
The child is playing with a red ball
challenges.translation: Das Kind spielt mit einem roten Ball

challenges.original: I am waiting for my friend
Because it is raining, I am staying home
challenges.translation: Weil es regnet, bleibe ich zu Hause

challenges.original: You must do your homework now
challenges.translation: Du musst jetzt deine Hausaufgaben machen

challenges.original: We lived in a big city
challenges.translation: Wir haben in einer großen Stadt gewohnt

challenges.original: The coffee is hotter than the tea
challenges.translation: Der Kaffee ist heißer als der Tee

challenges.original: I think that the teacher is nice
challenges.translation: Ich glaube, dass der Lehrer nett ist

challenges.original: She is wearing a beautiful dress
He has learned many words
Can you help me, please?
I don't have a fast car
The woman is talking to her father
challenges.translation: Die Frau spricht mit ihrem Vater

challenges.original: We are eating at a small table
challenges.translation: Wir essen an einem kleinen Tisch

challenges.original: I am going home after work
challenges.translation: Ich gehe nach der Arbeit nach Hause

challenges.original: The house is very old
Do you know the young man?
I am taking the bus to the city
challenges.translation: Ich nehme den Bus in die Stadt

challenges.original: He is opening the big window
challenges.translation: Er macht das große Fenster auf

challenges.original: She has written a long letter
challenges.translation: Sie hat einen langen Brief geschrieben

challenges.original: We should buy some milk
The students are listening to the music
I slept for eight hours
Where have you been?
The dog is sleeping under the table
challenges.translation: Der Hund schläft unter dem Tisch

challenges.original: I like the blue shoes best
challenges.translation: Ich mag die blauen Schuhe am liebsten

challenges.original: He is coming tomorrow at ten
We drank a lot of juice
Can I have a glass of water?
challenges.translation: Kann ich ein Glas Wasser haben?

challenges.original: They are going to the cinema together
The kitchen is clean now
I have seen the film already
challenges.translation: Ich habe den Film schon gesehen

challenges.original: Are you working on Saturday?
The cat is sitting on the chair
challenges.translation: Die Katze sitzt auf dem Stuhl

challenges.original: I don't like the cold weather
challenges.translation: Ich mag das kalte Wetter nicht

challenges.original: She has found a new job
challenges.translation: Sie hat einen neuen Job gefunden

challenges.original: We are visiting our grandparents
He is reading a difficult book
I forgot my bag today
challenges.translation: Ich habe heute meine Tasche vergessen

challenges.original: The flowers are very beautiful
I am going to the park now
challenges.translation: Ich gehe jetzt in den Park

challenges.original: Do you want a piece of cake?
The sun is shining today
I need to buy a ticket
He has a very fast bicycle
challenges.translation: Er hat ein sehr schnelles Fahrrad

challenges.original: We are walking through the forest
The children are playing outside
I have lost my telephone
The water is too cold for me
challenges.translation: Das Wasser ist mir zu kalt

challenges.original: She is dancing with her brother
I have to get up early
The food tastes very good
We are driving to the mountains
He is wearing a black hat
I have a big family
The bag is too heavy
I am learning German every day
They have a small apartment
The tea is without sugar
He is closing the door
We have waited for an hour
I am looking for my glasses
The girl is very happy
I am visiting a friend
He is washing his hands
The school is near the house
challenges.translation: Die Schule ist nah am Haus

challenges.original: I have invited my sister
They are eating a pizza
The weather is bad today
I am tired after the trip
challenges.translation: Ich bin müde nach der Reise

challenges.original: He is buying a new shirt
We have a lot of time
She is going to the doctor
I can play the guitar
The street is very quiet
I have bought a present
He is bringing the suitcase
We are drinking a beer
The baby is sleeping
I have a lot of work
They are flying to Berlin
The sky is blue
I am brushing my teeth
She is helping her mother
We are walking in the city
I have understood the question
The meat is very good
He is taking a shower
We are watching a movie
I have a green pen
The night is very dark
I am cooking the dinner
He is talking to the neighbor
We are finished with the list
challenges.translation: Wir sind fertig mit der Liste
